character.name: Male warrior, short dark brown
character.prompt:
Male warrior, short dark brown hair, short beard, broad heroic build.
Steel-blue pauldrons over brown leather coat and padded chest armor,
dark leather pants and heavy boots. Carries a large two-handed sword
with a glowing cold-blue crystalline edge (#7BA7BC). Hairline cold-blue
cracks visible on armor plates. Weathered, battle-worn. No hand glow,
no purple. Dark fantasy pixel art, Diablo 2 / Hades style, heavy black
outline, muted palette with cold-blue accent, transparent background.
